entities.name: power user
entities.context: a user who understands systems deeply enough to exploit their capabilities

entities.name: technical user
entities.context: a user who can implement systems, often defined by formal credentials

entities.name: first principles
entities.context: an approach to understanding systems that focuses on fundamental concepts and reasoning

entities.name: cardinality
entities.context: the belief that the 'technical' vs 'power user' distinction is a false binary

relationships.context: distinction between the two types of users
technical users should think in first principles
power users develop understanding through principles
believes the distinction underestimates power users' capacity
